repos.description: Building applications with LLMs through composability
repos.readme:
# LangChain

⚣ Building applications with LLMs through composability ⚣

## Features
- **Prompt Management**: Templates, formatting, and versioning
- **Chains**: Composable sequences of processing steps
- **Agents**: LLMs that can take actions
- **Memory**: State persistence across conversations

## Installation
```bash
pip install langchain
```

## Quick Start
```python
from langchain.chat_models import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.chains import LLMChain
```

## Architecture
LangChain uses a modular architecture with:
- Components: Core building blocks
- Integrations: Connectors to external services
- Chains: Workflow definitions
- Agents: Autonomous decision-making

## Security
- No hardcoded credentials
- Token-based authentication
- Rate limiting built-in

# React A JavaScript library for building user interfaces. ## Features - Declarative views - Component-based architecture - Virtual DOM for performance - Cross-platform support ## Install ```bash npm install react react-dom ``` ## Example ```jsx function App() { return

Hello World

; } ``` ## Contributing See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.

# Small Project

A tiny utility.

No features yet.

# RE2

RE2 is a regular expression library.

## Features
- Fast matching
- Safe (no catastrophic backtracking)
- Supports Perl-like syntax

## Build
```bash
g++ -o re2_test re2_test.cc -lre2
```

## Status
This project is in maintenance mode.

repos.description: Apache Superset is a modern data exploration and visualization platform
repos.readme:
# Apache Superset

Apache Superset 是一个开源的数据探索和可视化平台。

## Features / 特性
- **Rich Visualizations**: 丰富的图表类型
- **SQL Lab**: SQL 查询编辑器
- **Dashboard**: 仪表板
- **Security**: 安全认证

## Installation / 安装
```bash
pip install apache-superset
superset db upgrade
superset load_examples
superset fab create-admin
superset init
superset run -p 8088 --with-threads --reload --debugger
```

## Architecture / 架构
- Frontend: React, TypeScript
- Backend: Python, Flask
- Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL
- Cache: Redis

## Deployment / 部署
- Docker: docker compose up
- Kubernetes: Helm chart available

repos.description: Spring Boot makes it easy to create stand-alone, production-grade Spring based Applications
repos.readme:
# Spring Boot

Spring Boot makes it easy to create stand-alone, production-grade Spring based Applications.

## Features
- Embedded web server (Tomcat, Jetty, Undertow)
- Starter dependencies for easy Maven/Gradle config
- Automatic Spring configuration
- Production-ready features (metrics, health checks)

## Installation
```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
</dependency>
```

## Quick Start
```java
@SpringBootApplication
public class Application {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        SpringApplication.run(Application.class, args);
    }
}
```

## Architecture
- Auto-configuration
- Spring MVC / WebFlux
- Spring Data JPA / MongoDB / Redis
- Spring Security
- Actuator for health/metrics
